text: Skuld is being stretched past its single-purpose role — weekly deep-dive is a separate business ritual, not a briefing
Munin namespace design mixes too many concerns and violates the two-layer state model
Value-map scoring (1-5 composite) is pseudo-quantitative and not tied to revenue
Self-hosted analytics unjustified — adds operational burden without proven value
VIP mentoring needs sales experiments not automated research
Help-me-sell features will produce generic sludge without real case studies and client language
Business thesis is backward — should optimize for follow-through and account expansion, not visibility
Missing revenue streams: account expansion, post-talk follow-on, productized audits, retainers
Proposal assumes bottleneck is signal discovery when real bottleneck is follow-through and packaging
Outcome metrics proposed but no instrumentation path defined — where do follow-ups/meetings/proposals get captured?
Source of truth for commercial state (client follow-ups, leads, offers) is undefined
Proof-point extraction from client deliverables crosses unsettled trust boundaries
Weekly review risks duplicating daily briefing unless it answers a distinct question
Revenue Radar name now misleading — scope is commercial follow-through, not market scanning
GitHub signals remain weakly justified unless tied to specific commercial proof assets
